337                     AVG(cache_ratio) AS avg_cache_ratio,
338                     MAX(total_tokens) AS largest_call_tokens,
339                     MAX(event_timestamp) AS latest_event_timestamp
340                 FROM distinct_calls
341                 GROUP BY fact_type
342             )
343             SELECT
344                 type_counts.fact_type,
345                 type_counts.occurrences,
346                 type_counts.associated_calls,
347                 type_counts.fact_names,
348                 call_sums.associated_input_tokens,
349                 call_sums.associated_cached_input_tokens,
350                 call_sums.associated_uncached_input_tokens,
351                 call_sums.associated_output_tokens,
352                 call_sums.associated_reasoning_output_tokens,
353                 call_sums.associated_total_tokens,
354                 call_sums.avg_cache_ratio,
355                 call_sums.largest_call_tokens,
356                 call_sums.latest_event_timestamp,
357                 (
358                     SELECT s2.fact_name
359                     FROM scoped AS s2
360                     WHERE s2.fact_type = type_counts.fact_type
361                     GROUP BY s2.fact_name
362                     ORDER BY SUM(s2.event_count) DESC, SUM(s2.uncached_input_tokens) DESC
363                     LIMIT 1
364                 ) AS top_fact_name
365             FROM type_counts
366             JOIN call_sums ON call_sums.fact_type = type_counts.fact_type
367             ORDER BY {sort_map[sort]} {direction_sql},
368                 associated_total_tokens DESC,
369                 type_counts.fact_type
370             {limit_clause}
371             """,
372             query_params,

48     rows = conn.execute(
49         f"""
50         WITH candidate_usage AS (
51             SELECT u.*
52             FROM canonical_usage_events u
53             {where_sql}
54             ORDER BY
55                 u.total_tokens DESC,
56                 u.uncached_input_tokens DESC,
57                 u.event_timestamp DESC,
58                 u.record_id ASC
59             {limit_sql}
60         ),
61         tool_counts AS (
62             SELECT
63                 tool_calls.record_id,
64                 COUNT(*) AS tool_call_count,
65                 COALESCE(SUM(output_size_bytes), 0) AS tool_output_size_bytes
66             FROM candidate_usage
67             CROSS JOIN tool_calls ON tool_calls.record_id = candidate_usage.record_id
68             GROUP BY tool_calls.record_id
69         ),
70         command_counts AS (
71             SELECT
72                 command_runs.record_id,
73                 COUNT(*) AS command_run_count,
74                 COALESCE(SUM(output_size_bytes), 0) AS command_output_size_bytes,
75                 SUM(CASE WHEN status != 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_command_count
76             FROM candidate_usage
77             CROSS JOIN command_runs ON command_runs.record_id = candidate_usage.record_id
78             GROUP BY command_runs.record_id
79         ),
80         file_counts AS (
81             SELECT
82                 file_events.record_id,
83                 COUNT(*) AS file_event_count,
84                 SUM(CASE WHEN operation = 'read' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS file_read_count,
85                 SUM(CASE WHEN operation IN ('modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS file_write_count
86             FROM candidate_usage
87             CROSS JOIN file_events ON file_events.record_id = candidate_usage.record_id
88             GROUP BY file_events.record_id
89         )
90         SELECT
91             u.record_id,
92             u.session_id,
93             u.thread_key,
94             u.thread_name,
95             u.parent_thread_name,
96             u.event_timestamp,
97             u.model,
98             u.effort,
99             u.call_initiator,
100             u.call_initiator_confidence,
101             u.total_tokens,
102             u.input_tokens,
103             u.cached_input_tokens,
104             u.uncached_input_tokens,
105             u.output_tokens,
106             u.reasoning_output_tokens,
107             u.model_context_window,
108             u.context_window_percent,
109             COALESCE(tc.tool_call_count, 0) AS tool_call_count,
110             COALESCE(tc.tool_output_size_bytes, 0) AS tool_output_size_bytes,
111             COALESCE(cc.command_run_count, 0) AS command_run_count,
112             COALESCE(cc.command_output_size_bytes, 0) AS command_output_size_bytes,
113             COALESCE(cc.failed_command_count, 0) AS failed_command_count,
114             COALESCE(fc.file_event_count, 0) AS file_event_count,
115             COALESCE(fc.file_read_count, 0) AS file_read_count,
116             COALESCE(fc.file_write_count, 0) AS file_write_count
117         FROM candidate_usage u
118         LEFT JOIN tool_counts tc ON tc.record_id = u.record_id
119         LEFT JOIN command_counts cc ON cc.record_id = u.record_id
120         LEFT JOIN file_counts fc ON fc.record_id = u.record_id
121         ORDER BY u.total_tokens DESC, u.uncached_input_tokens DESC, u.event_timestamp DESC, u.record_id ASC
122         """,
123         query_params,

51     rows = conn.execute(
52         f"""
53         WITH filtered AS (
54             SELECT
55                 fe.file_event_key,
56                 fe.record_id,
57                 fe.operation,
58                 fe.path_hash,
59                 fe.path_basename,
60                 fe.path_extension,
61                 fe.path_identity,
62                 u.thread_key,
63                 u.thread_name,
64                 u.session_id,
65                 u.event_timestamp,
66                 u.total_tokens
67             FROM file_events fe
68             JOIN canonical_usage_events u ON u.record_id = fe.record_id
69             {where_sql}
70         ),
71         sequenced AS (
72             SELECT
73                 filtered.*,
74                 LAG(path_hash) OVER (
75                     PARTITION BY COALESCE(thread_key, session_id)
76                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, record_id, file_event_key
77                 ) AS previous_path_hash
78             FROM filtered
79         )
80         SELECT
81             path_hash,
82             MIN(path_identity) AS path_identity,
83             MIN(path_basename) AS path_basename,
84             MIN(path_extension) AS path_extension,
85             COUNT(*) AS occurrences,
86             SUM(CASE WHEN operation = 'read' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS read_count,
87             SUM(CASE WHEN operation IN ('modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
88                 AS write_count,
89             SUM(CASE WHEN operation NOT IN ('read', 'modify', 'edit', 'write') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
90                 AS other_operation_count,
91             COUNT(DISTINCT record_id) AS call_count,
92             COUNT(DISTINCT thread_key) AS thread_count,
93             COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count,
94             COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens,
95             SUM(CASE WHEN previous_path_hash = path_hash THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
96                 AS adjacent_retouch_count,
97             MIN(event_timestamp) AS first_seen_at,
98             MAX(event_timestamp) AS last_seen_at
99         FROM sequenced
100         GROUP BY path_hash
101         HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?
102         ORDER BY
103             read_count DESC,
104             adjacent_retouch_count DESC,
105             occurrences DESC,
106             total_tokens DESC,

105                     PARTITION BY COALESCE(thread_key, session_id)

121             SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(exit_code, 0) != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failure_count,

135             occurrences DESC,
136             total_tokens DESC,

141     conn.execute(
142         f"""
143         INSERT INTO thread_summaries (
144             thread_key,
145             is_archived_scope,
146             thread_label,
147             first_event_timestamp,
148             latest_event_timestamp,
149             call_count,
150             session_count,
151             input_tokens,
152             cached_input_tokens,
153             uncached_input_tokens,
154             output_tokens,
155             reasoning_output_tokens,
156             total_tokens,
157             estimated_cost_usd,
158             usage_credits,
159             avg_cache_ratio,
160             max_context_window_percent,
161             max_recommendation_score,
162             primary_recommendation,
163             call_initiator_summary,
164             archived_call_count,
165             updated_at
166         )
167         SELECT
168             {thread_key_expr} AS thread_key,
169             ? AS is_archived_scope,
170             coalesce(max(thread_name), max(parent_thread_name), max(session_id)) AS thread_label,
171             MIN(event_timestamp) AS first_event_timestamp,
172             MAX(event_timestamp) AS latest_event_timestamp,
173             COUNT(*) AS call_count,
174             COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count,
175             coalesce(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS input_tokens,
176             coalesce(SUM(cached_input_tokens), 0) AS cached_input_tokens,
177             coalesce(SUM(uncached_input_tokens), 0) AS uncached_input_tokens,
178             coalesce(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS output_tokens,
179             coalesce(SUM(reasoning_output_tokens), 0) AS reasoning_output_tokens,
180             coalesce(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens,
181             NULL AS estimated_cost_usd,
182             NULL AS usage_credits,
183             coalesce(AVG(cache_ratio), 0) AS avg_cache_ratio,
184             coalesce(MAX(context_window_percent), 0) AS max_context_window_percent,
185             coalesce(MAX(
186                 CASE
187                     WHEN context_window_percent >= 0.90 THEN 100
188                     WHEN cache_ratio < 0.20 AND input_tokens >= 50000 THEN 80
189                     WHEN total_tokens >= 100000 THEN 70
190                     ELSE 0
191                 END
192             ), 0) AS max_recommendation_score,
193             CASE
194                 WHEN MAX(context_window_percent) >= 0.90 THEN 'high_context_use'
195                 WHEN MIN(cache_ratio) < 0.20 AND MAX(input_tokens) >= 50000
196                     THEN 'low_cache_reuse'
197                 WHEN MAX(total_tokens) >= 100000 THEN 'large_calls'
198                 ELSE NULL
199             END AS primary_recommendation,
200             CASE
201                 WHEN SUM(
202                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'codex'
203                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
204                 ) > SUM(
205                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'user'
206                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
207                 )
208                     THEN 'mostly_codex'
209                 WHEN SUM(
210                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'user'
211                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
212                 ) > SUM(
213                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'codex'
214                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
215                 )
216                     THEN 'mostly_user'
217                 WHEN SUM(
218                     CASE WHEN coalesce(call_initiator, 'unknown') = 'unknown'
219                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
220                 ) = COUNT(*)
221                     THEN 'unknown'
222                 ELSE 'mixed'
223             END AS call_initiator_summary,
224             SUM(CASE WHEN coalesce(is_archived, 0) != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
225                 AS archived_call_count,
226             ? AS updated_at
227         FROM canonical_usage_events
228         {where_clause}
229         GROUP BY {thread_key_expr}
230         """,
231         [scope, updated_at, *params],

337     conn.execute(
338         f"""
339         WITH usage_event_links AS (
340             SELECT
341                 record_id,
342                 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
343                     PARTITION BY coalesce(nullif(thread_key, ''), 'session:' || session_id)
344                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, cumulative_total_tokens, line_number, record_id
345                 ) AS next_thread_call_index,
346                 LAG(record_id) OVER (
347                     PARTITION BY coalesce(nullif(thread_key, ''), 'session:' || session_id)
348                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, cumulative_total_tokens, line_number, record_id
349                 ) AS previous_id,
350                 LEAD(record_id) OVER (
351                     PARTITION BY coalesce(nullif(thread_key, ''), 'session:' || session_id)
352                     ORDER BY event_timestamp, cumulative_total_tokens, line_number, record_id
353                 ) AS next_id
354             FROM usage_events
355             {where_clause}
356         )
357         UPDATE usage_events AS target
358         SET
359             thread_call_index = links.next_thread_call_index,
360             previous_record_id = links.previous_id,
361             next_record_id = links.next_id
362         FROM usage_event_links AS links
363         WHERE target.record_id = links.record_id
364         """,
365         list(params),
